findings.title: Missing Data Handling Justification
findings.description: The system lacks justification for data collection, which may lead to non-compliance with data handling policies.
assumptions: Data collection justifications are required as per policy.

evidence.excerpt: The input bundle is missing: No tickets or work items provided.

recommendations: Implement a mechanism to justify data collection for all user data.

metadata.mitigation: Implement a mechanism to justify data collection for all user data.

findings.title: Missing Consent Mechanism for Data Collection
findings.description: There is no evidence of a consent mechanism for data collection, which violates privacy policies.
assumptions: A consent mechanism is required for data collection.

evidence.excerpt: The input bundle is missing: No supporting documents provided.

recommendations: Develop and implement a clear consent mechanism for data collection.

metadata.mitigation: Develop and implement a clear consent mechanism for data collection.

findings.title: Retention Policy Violation
findings.description: The system does not have a defined retention policy for user data, which may lead to data retention beyond the allowed period.
assumptions: Data retention must be limited to 90 days.

evidence.excerpt: The input bundle is missing: No customer notes or interview data.

recommendations: Establish and enforce a data retention policy that limits data storage to 90 days.

metadata.mitigation: Establish and enforce a data retention policy that limits data storage to 90 days.

findings.title: Potential Data Exposure Risks
findings.description: The lack of documentation and metrics may lead to unmonitored data exposure risks.
assumptions: Monitoring and documentation are essential for identifying data exposure risks.

evidence.excerpt: The input bundle is missing: No metrics snapshot data.

recommendations: Implement monitoring and documentation practices to identify and mitigate data exposure risks.

metadata.mitigation: Implement monitoring and documentation practices to identify and mitigate data exposure risks.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Gaps
findings.description: The system may not fully comply with WCAG AA standards, which could hinder accessibility for users with disabilities.
assumptions: Accessibility is a requirement, and compliance with WCAG AA is necessary.

evidence.excerpt: The input bundle is missing: No competitive analysis or competitor brief.

recommendations: Conduct an accessibility audit to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct an accessibility audit to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 3 privacy, 1 security). 3 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (4 blockers, 3 warnings).
